case_title: HR IDEAS, INC. VS. CAFE FLORE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HR IDEAS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-27-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE FLORE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HR IDEAS, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAFE FLORE THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THIS CASE CONSTITUTES A SPLIT CLAIM WITH CASE NO. 834894. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HR IDEAS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE FLORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2010 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-24-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT OT HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALEX ANOLIK. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
